title: Zero-Day Security Architecture
description: Production-style zero-day incident simulation showing exploit replay, containment trade-offs, blast-radius analysis, and automated response flows.
bullets: Incident replay with step-by-step breach progression
MITRE ATT&CK mapping and threat scenario toggles
Containment decision view with zero-trust failure mode

title: AI-Powered Vulnerability Remediation Orchestrator
description: Product-focused remediation case study showing how AI can triage vulnerabilities, generate secure patches, validate fixes, and create developer-ready pull requests.
bullets: Enterprise-style product narrative with problem, solution, and impact framing
Interactive architecture and workflow views for triage-to-PR automation
Concrete secure-fix example with PR output and portfolio positioning
Full build prompt for a FastAPI, React, LLM, and GitHub integration stack
